case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. XIOMARA DEL CARMEN ADELINA FUENTES-GUERRA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUENTES-GUERRA, XIOMARA DEL CARMEN ADELINA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
